signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (latest data), up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence**[1]

signals.headline: US x Iran Peace Deal Odds Surge to 74% by June 30 | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US x Iran Peace Deal Odds Surge to 74% by June 30 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Market volume hits $16M with Yes shares at 74% for a permanent deal by June 30, fueling X posts on diplomatic breakthroughs or over-optimism[4]. No confirmed announcements or resolutions yet, but real-time trades imply smart money betting against rapid peace given parallel conflict markets.
